title: Deformation Monitoring Using Sentinel-1 SAR Data
author: Devanthéry, Núria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper describes the data processing and analysis procedure implemented by the authors to analyse Sentinel-1 data. The procedure is an advanced Differential Interferometric SAR (DInSAR) technique that generates deformation maps and time series of deformation from multiple SAR images acquired over the same site. The second part of the paper illustrates the results of the procedure. The first deformation monitoring results obtained using Sentinel-1 SAR data over the metropolitan area of Barcelona (Spain) are described and analysed.
steps_raw: This paper describes the data processing and analysis procedure implemented by the authors to analyse Sentinel-1 data. The second part of the paper illustrates the results of the procedure. The first deformation monitoring results obtained using Sentinel-1 SAR data over the metropolitan area of Barcelona (Spain) are described and analysed.
